title: What Scripture Actually Calls a Good Day's Work
caption:
Scripture never called hustle a virtue. It called faithfulness one.

Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much (Luke 16:10). Small and consistent beats loud and sporadic. Work like it's for the Lord, not the feed (Colossians 3:23), and nobody has to see it for it to count.

Rest isn't the enemy of the work either. God worked six days and stopped on the seventh by design, not because He was tired. A man who never rests just doesn't trust anyone to hold it while he sleeps.

David kept sheep before he kept a kingdom. Joseph ran a prison before he ran a nation. The unseen years aren't wasted years, they're the ones actually building you.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #work
